nasb.text: Then you returned and wept before the Lord; but the Lord did not listen to your voice nor give ear to you.

esv.text: And you returned and wept before the Lord, but the Lord did not listen to your voice or give ear to you.

cnv.text: 你們就回來，在耶和華面前哭，但耶和華不聽你們的聲音，也不向你們側耳。

ccb.text: 你们回来在耶和华面前哭泣，但耶和华不理会你们的哭声。
